turns.user_message: Yeah, I guess so. I've been smoking for about 10 years now. I usually smoke after meals, during breaks at work, and when I'm out with friends who smoke. step2_rag_chunks: Many people smoke out of habit during specific routines such as after meals, while drinking tea or coffee, or when talking with friends.
Avoid situations where others are smoking during the early stages of quitting. Being around smokers can increase the urge to smoke.
Replacing smoking with another activity such as chewing gum, eating healthy snacks, or walking can help break the habit.

step4_session_phase.phase_instruction: You are in the MOTIVATION phase. You understand their triggers. Now explore their motivation: why do they want to quit — is it health, family, cost, doctor advice? Have they tried before and what happened? Be empathetic. Do NOT push strategies yet.
